0067.issue: [S0067] "@types/node":"^22.19.19" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.frontier_silicon/blob/master/package.json) does not cover minimum node.js version 22. Consider updating to "@types/node":"^22" to match the engines clause.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.0.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.frontier_silicon/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
